name: MES Running Buffer (20×)

notes.en: Dilute to 1× before use. Optimized for NuPAGE Bis-Tris gels; better resolution for low MW proteins (<30 kDa) compared to MOPS buffer. Do not adjust pH.
notes.zh: 20× 母液。使用前稀释至 1×。适用于 NuPAGE Bis-Tris 凝胶，分辨低分子量蛋白 (<30 kDa) 优于 MOPS。不要调 pH。

ref: Invitrogen NuPAGE Technical Guide (Thermo Fisher MAN0003690)

usage.en: MES SDS running buffer for resolving low-MW proteins (3.5–60 kDa) on Bis-Tris gels.
usage.zh: MES SDS 电泳缓冲液，用于 Bis-Tris 胶上分辨低分子量蛋白（3.5–60 kDa）。
